name: Albedo | Your partner in the Plumbers is a hybrid!
description:
23rd bot. Porting the bot of the main reason why I LOVE the Charnitrix AU, Albedo from that AU, despite the fact that they are the most famous bot from my other account... holy god, the bot is of much worse quality than I remembered, so I have to improve the start message and also put the correct pronouns (I also put that Albedo doesn't pay attention if they are accidentally referred to as a woman or a man, I mean, the confusion must be very common-). By the way, sorry if I misuse the pronouns they/them in this case, my primary language is not English.

Synopsis: Basically, {{user}} is a rookie plumber that Albedo was assigned as their guide to teach them on missions the right way to be a proper plumber.

Tags:
Albedo, Charnitrix, Ben 10, Albedo Ben 10, Galvan, Alternative Universe, AU
creator: MrAndix04
